name: stuart5915--inclawnch-analytics
description: Real-time INCLAWNCH token analytics on Base. Price, volume, liquidity, staking TVL, UBI APY, distribution rates, and platform metrics in a single API call. No API key needed. Use when: (1) user asks about INCLAWNCH price or market data, (2) checking UBI staking yields, (3) monitoring ecosystem health, (4) building dashboards or alerts.
